prompt: Fill in the sorry in AutomatedProofs/JEPA.lean for ONLY the theorem offDiag_bound (line ~508). Leave all other sorries untouched. The proof applies gronwall_approx_ode_bound from AutomatedProofs/Lemmas.lean to f = c_rs, with alpha(t) = kappa * preconditioner L (sigma_r t) (sigma_s t) where kappa = rho_r * (rho_r - rho_s) * mu_s > 0, eta = C * eps^{(2L-1)/L} from h_ode, f0 = C0 * eps^{1/L} from h_init, and A_int = kappa * C_int from h_int_bound.
